formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}y_{k , i} \left(\omega\right) = \underset{m \in \mathcal{K}_{e}}{\sum} \underset{\genfrac{}{}{0pt}{}{j \in \mathcal{I}_{k}^{p} \cap \mathcal{I}_{t}}{j \leq i}}{\sum} \xi_{m , k , 2 I + 1 - j} \left(\omega\right) - \underset{m \in \mathcal{K}_{e}}{\sum} \underset{\genfrac{}{}{0pt}{}{j \in \mathcal{I}_{k}^{p} \cap \mathcal{I}_{t}}{j < i}}{\sum} \xi_{k , m , j} \left(\omega\right) + \underset{\genfrac{}{}{0pt}{}{j \in \mathcal{I}_{k}^{p} \cap \mathcal{I}_{d}}{j \leq i}}{\sum} \vartheta_{k , j} \left(\omega\right) - & \underset{\genfrac{}{}{0pt}{}{j \in \mathcal{I}_{k}^{p} \cap \mathcal{I}_{d}}{j < i}}{\sum} \beta_{k , j} \left(\omega\right) , \\ & \forall k \in \mathcal{K}_{e} , i \in \mathcal{I}_{k}^{p} ,\end{matrix}

formulas.label: fdA.6
formulas.latex: \left\{\begin{matrix} & s_{i , j , f}^{b} \left(\omega\right) \leq C \underset{k \in \mathcal{K}}{\sum} \psi_{k , i , j , f} \left(\omega\right) \\ & s_{i , j , f}^{b} \left(\omega\right) \leq s_{i , j , f - 1}^{r} \left(\omega\right) + s_{i , j , f} \\ & s_{i , j , f}^{b} \left(\omega\right) \geq C \underset{k \in \mathcal{K}}{\sum} \psi_{k , i , j , f} \left(\omega\right) - M \rho_{i , j , f} \left(\omega\right) \\ & s_{i , j , f}^{b} \left(\omega\right) \geq s_{i , j , f - 1}^{r} \left(\omega\right) + s_{i , j , f} - M \left(1 - \rho_{i , j , f} \left(\omega\right)\right) \end{matrix}\right
